text: Artificial intelligence is changing how we work. Many routine tasks, such as data entry or scheduling, are now automated, freeing employees to focus on more creative and strategic work. Productivity tools powered by AI help workers analyze information faster, manage projects more efficiently, and even predict customer needs. However, instead of replacing humans entirely, AI often works alongside them in what is called human-AI collaboration. This partnership can lead to better decisions and improved outcomes. While some jobs may disappear, new roles are emerging in areas like AI training and system management. Overall, adapting to these changes and learning new skills will be essential for workers in the future workplace.
